body: A 'field-dependent' forcing is a user-specified forcing term that depends on `x, y, z, t, u`, where `u` is the field being forced, and optionally parameters.
title: Allows field-dependent SimpleForcing. Updates plankton growth example.

body: Links to documentation probably broke upon changing the org name. Also, the keyword change from `length` to `extent` was apparently not fully propagated through README & doc. Not sure but figured that sending this as PR might be helpful.
title: fix doc links (clima org) and examples (extent keyword)
